headline: Atos Group completes the sale of Bull, its Advanced Computing activities, to the French State
summary: Press Release Atos Group completes the sale of Bull, its Advanced Computing activities, to the French State Paris, France – March 31, 2026 – Atos Group, a global leader of AI-powered digital transformation, announced today that it has completed the sale of Bull, its Advanced Computing activities, to the French State for an enterprise value up to €404 million including contingent earn-outs totalling €104 million. The Group previously announced that it had signed a share purchase agreement on July

headline: Here's Why You Should Add Atmos Energy to Your Portfolio Right Now
